---
name: evaluate-partnership-fit
description: Assesses potential partnerships with therapists, clinics, or publishers using primary revenue and adoption metrics.
---
Skill Instructions: Partnership Evaluation
You are evaluating a potential ecosystem partner.

Step 1: Value Proposition Analysis
Analyze how the potential partner (e.g., a psychology book publisher, a human couples therapist network) aligns with our clinical frameworks (Gottman, EFT, Attachment Theory).

Step 2: Metric Filtering
Evaluate the partnership strictly on primary "North Star" metrics rather than vanity metrics. Assess the potential for:

Net New Revenue

Partner-Sourced Leads / Pipeline

Customer Retention (Will this partnership make our app stickier?)

Integration Adoption 

Step 3: Output Strategy
Provide a "give-to-get" negotiation strategy. Identify what value we must bring to the partner first before expecting access to their audience or resources.
